title: COMMUNITY DEVELOPMENTAL DISABILITIES PROGRAM - 211info
text: MULTNOMAH COUNTY INTELLECTUAL AND DEVELOPMENTAL DISABILITIES GRESHAM COMMUNITY DEVELOPMENTAL DISABILITIES PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a range of support services to individuals with intellectual and/or developmental disabilities. Services can include case management, individual and family support plans, access to brokerage services for transportation, in-home supports or residential placement, and employment and vocational services. 600 NE 8th Street Gresham, OR 97030 Eligibility: Children and adults with an intellectual or developmental disability. Applicant must be an Oregon resident. Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (503) 988-2535 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 988-2535 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information or to schedule an appointment FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Proof of address, and all records of psychological and medical assessments related to the disability LANGUAGES: English, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Multnomah County Services: Case/Care Management * Disabilities Issues Disability Related Center Based Employment Disability Related Transportation Home/Community Based Developmental Disabilities Programs Residential Placement Services for People with Disabilities If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. MULTNOMAH COUNTY INTELLECTUAL AND DEVELOPMENTAL DISABILITIES GRESHAM
